title: noronhia olearia
intro: Noronhia olearia, also known as the 'Lemon bird tree', is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to Madagascar. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Noronhia olearia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
